title: Amended Version of AB30 Pushed Forward to Committee to Expedite Authorization of E15 Sale in California
content: An amended version of AB30 has been pushed forward to Committee to expedite the authorization of E15 sale in California. The bill could allow gasoline with 10.5% to 15% ethanol to be sold in California, despite current restrictions. This would be a temporary measure until the California Environmental Policy Council reviews the blends and the state board either sets formal fuel standards or confirms that such standards can't meet legal requirements.
author: Aru Somya
